title: Totem Tweaks
description: Small totem pop and extensive customizability of the pop animation.
body:
🗿 Totem Tweaks Mod 1.21+

Customizable Pop Animation/Size/Position and Totem Size. Compatible with every texture pack you would like to use. ⭐ Star on GitHub
## Features #### _General Features_ - Changing totem size for handheld - Changing the totem pop size - Disable Equip Animation of the totem #### _Totem Pop Animation_ - Option to Disable the pop animation - Configurable Totem Pop Animation Speed - Lock Rotation Position (Locks the position of the totem during rotation) - Disable Rotations (Disable all totem rotations) # Make sure to check out my other mods too! [🛡️ Totem and Shield Switcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/switch) [👆🏻 Cursor Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cursor)
